falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 5200 invalidates the fractal similarity and suggests the bottoming process failed, converting UNKNOWN into a confirmed downtrend

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 implies contained fear; sustained VIX above 25 indicates panic escalation incompatible with a bottom formation, proving the current signal was a false stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there at 3:00pm ET close
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid this aggressive contradicts the macro bottom thesis; it signals recession pricing has taken over, invalidating the risk-asset recovery pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
